goal: Harden /api/v2 write semantics by implementing if_revision conflict checks and idempotency_key replay protection for story saves and progress updates, with dedicated contract tests.
constraints: Use lightweight in-memory tracking for this phase without heavy new dependencies.
deliverables: if_revision conflict validation in v2 story and v2 progress write endpoints.
idempotency replay and conflict handling in v2 story and v2 progress write endpoints.
Automated test coverage for success replay and conflict cases.
